description: A retail banking customer has moved and needs to update their mailing address.

nodes.task_description: Authenticate the customer using two-factor authentication.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully verifies the customer's identity.

nodes.task_description: Collect the new address from the customer.

expected_outcome.value: Agent accurately captures the new mailing address.

nodes.task_description: Update the customer's address in the core banking system.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully updates the address and confirms the change.
